DIRECT_OVERLAP: Train/test members overlap directly in the resolved member roster.
ACCESSION_ROOT_OVERLAP: Train/test members reuse the same accession-root identifiers.
UNIREF_CLUSTER_OVERLAP: Train/test members overlap at the UniRef cluster level.
SHARED_PARTNER_LEAKAGE: Train/test members retain shared partner/component leakage signatures.
INSUFFICIENT_PROVENANCE: Paper evidence is too weak to treat the claimed split as governing.
INCOMPLETE_MODALITY_COVERAGE: Required modalities are missing or incomplete.
CANDIDATE_ONLY_NON_GOVERNING: Some evidence remains candidate-only and non-governing.
AUDIT_ONLY_EVIDENCE: Some evidence is audit-only or non-redistributable in the warehouse.
UNRESOLVED_ENTITY_MAPPING: Explicit paper members could not be resolved against the warehouse.
UNRESOLVED_SPLIT_MEMBERSHIP: The paper does not expose enough roster detail to reconstruct the split deterministically.
POLICY_MISMATCH: The claimed split strategy does not satisfy ProteoSphere training policy.
WAREHOUSE_COVERAGE_GAP: The warehouse does not fully materialize the needed source or benchmark surface.
